description.zh-cn: Cookie/隐私合规：在前台底部/顶部自动注入可定制的 Cookie 同意横幅(含接受/拒绝与隐私政策链接),用户选择保存在本地并上报后台留存同意记录(含 IP/时间/选择),帮助满足 GDPR/Cookie 告知要求。
description.en: Cookie/privacy compliance: auto-inject a customizable cookie consent banner (accept/reject + policy link) at the storefront top/bottom; the choice is stored locally and logged server-side (IP/time/choice) to help meet GDPR/cookie notice requirements.
